description_long: This stuffed toy features a large, square-shaped head with a textured, tan surface resembling woven fabric. Its face is simple, with two large, round black eyes and no visible mouth or nose, giving it a minimalist and endearing appearance. The body is small and proportionally shorter than the head, with a red, knitted-looking patch on the torso that stands out against the tan limbs and head. The arms and legs are short and slightly bent, with visible stitching details that enhance the handmade aesthetic. The back of the toy shows a continuation of the red patch and additional stitching, suggesting a soft, plush construction. The overall design is charming and playful, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments like parks or neighborhood spaces.
description: A tan, fabric-textured stuffed toy with a large square head, black eyes, and a red patch on its torso. Its simple, stitched design gives it a handmade, playful look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the toy's large square head, two round black eyes, and a prominent red patch on the torso.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the toy's head shape and the side of the red torso patch, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the continuation of the red patch and visible stitching details on the back of the head and body.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the head's shape and the side of the red patch, with no facial features visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon humanoid figure with a large square head
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with two large, round black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and simple appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides and legs apart.
